title: galium viscosum subsp. bovei
intro: Galium viscosum subsp. bovei, also known as sticky bedstraw, is a subspecies of perennial herb belonging to the gentian family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and astringent properties. The health benefits of Galium viscosum subsp. bovei include reducing inflammation, treating wounds, and soothing digestive issues, among others. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make infusions, teas, and tinctures, which can be administered internally to harness its medicinal properties.
